        public boolean intersectionBetween2Segments(Segment seg)
        Test intersection between 2 segments

      • intersectsSegment

        public boolean intersectsSegment(Segment other)
        Check if this segment intersects another
        Parameters:
        other - other segment to test intersection with
        Returns:
        true if this segment intersects other segment, else returns false

      • containsPoint

        public boolean containsPoint(Point pt)
        Check if this segment contains the given point
        Parameters:
        pt - point
        Returns:
        true if this segment contains the given point, false otherwise
